CreateEvent.description: Grants permission to create a BugBust event

EvaluateProfilingGroups.description: Grants permission to evaluate checked-in profiling groups

GetEvent.description: Grants permission to view customer details about an event

GetJoinEventStatus.description: Grants permission to view the status of a BugBust player's attempt to join a BugBust event

JoinEvent.description: Grants permission to join an event

ListBugs.description: Grants permission to view the bugs that were imported into an event for players to work on

ListEventParticipants.description: Grants permission to view the participants of an event

ListEventScores.description: Grants permission to view the scores of an event's players

ListEvents.description: Grants permission to List BugBust events

ListProfilingGroups.description: Grants permission to view the profiling groups that were imported into an event for players to work on

ListPullRequests.description: Grants permission to view the pull requests used by players to submit fixes to their claimed bugs in an event

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to lists tag for a Bugbust resource

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a Bugbust resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a Bugbust resource

UpdateEvent.description: Grants permission to update a BugBust event

UpdateWorkItem.description: Grants permission to update a work item as claimed or unclaimed (bug or profiling group)

UpdateWorkItemAdmin.description: Grants permission to update an event's work item (bug or profiling group)

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access based on the tag keys that are passed in the request
